title: malaxis ranauensis
intro: Malaxis ranauensis, also known as the Sabah Malaxis or Ranau Malaxis, is a species of orchid that is native to the tropical forests of Sabah, Malaysia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful for treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Malaxis ranauensis include reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared into herbal tea, infusions, or dried extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
